name: Pan 40 / Pantodac
source_note: Data compiled for Arogya knowledge base. Verify against 1mg.com and pharmeasy.in for live updates.
how_it_works: Proton pump inhibitor that binds irreversibly to H+/K+ ATPase on gastric parietal cells. Fewer drug interactions than omeprazole.
food_interactions: Take before meals for best effect
what_to_avoid: Preferred PPI when on clopidogrel (unlike omeprazole)
Use minimum effective dose for minimum duration
